plan_metrics.plan_content:
The plan is ready for your review. Here's a summary of what will be built:

## Plan: Add `@ai-sdk/pixelart` Provider

I explored the codebase thoroughly and modeled the new package after **`packages/luma`** — the simplest existing image-only provider. No existing files are modified except the root `tsconfig.json`.

### New Package: `packages/pixelart/`

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` | `PixelArtImageModelId`, `PixelArtStyle` (`"pixel" \| "retro" \| "8bit"`), `PixelArtImageSettings` interface |
| `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` | `PixelArtImageModel` class implementing `ImageModelV3`; Zod options schema with `style` + `pixelDensity` |
| `src/pixelart-provider.ts` | `createPixelArt()` factory, `PixelArtProvider` interface, `pixelart` singleton |
| `src/version.ts` | Build-time version string |
| `src/index.ts` | Public API surface |
| `package.json` | `@ai-sdk/pixelart` v0.0.0, standard deps |
| `tsconfig.json` + `tsconfig.build.json` | TypeScript project config |
| `tsup.config.ts` | CJS + ESM dual build |
| `vitest.node.config.js` + `vitest.edge.config.js` | Test runner configs |

### Only Existing File Changed
- Root **`tsconfig.json`** — one line added: `{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }`

### Key Design Decisions
- **Base URL**: `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1`; API key from `PIXELART_API_KEY` env var (Bearer token)
- **API shape**: `POST /images/generations` returning `{ data: [{ b64_json }] }` — same as OpenAI DALL-E (simple, synchronous, no polling)
- **Provider options** passed via `providerOptions.pixelart`: `style` + `pixelDensity`, Zod-validated
- **`size`** forwarded to the API; `aspectRatio` and `seed` produce unsupported warnings
- Language/embedding models throw `NoSuchModelError`
- `maxImagesPerCall = 1`
